name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: We’re lagging behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
We're lagging behind | Friend --

In the past month, Donald Trump’s supporters have stepped up for him. He held his first major fundraiser this week, bringing in more than $5 million -- more than double what was expected.

Bernie Sanders’ supporters came through, too -- they chipped in $1 million in a single day after Sanders won West Virginia, and now the Sanders campaign just spent $1.5 million on TV ads in California.

I hate to say it, but right now, we're the team lagging behind.

**The good news is we still have a few days before our fundraising deadline on May 31st, and if 12 people from your area chip in today, we can get back on track -- can you make your first donation right now (we’ll send you a free sticker to say thanks!)?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU1ODMxNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzOTk3NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU1ODMxNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzOTk3NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0)

If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU1ODMxNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzOTk3NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU1ODMxNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzOTk3NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU1ODMxNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzOTk3NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU1ODMxNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzOTk3NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU1ODMxNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzOTk3NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU1ODMxNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzOTk3NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU1ODMxNjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzOTk3NDczS0&mt=1&rt=0)! name: Rand Paul
subject: Will you join me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
We are running out of time in May. Will you join me to keep the Senate red? | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35552037:WNkzyCYeN:m:1:1320601823:A8F192F6A5B2700EB62FCEEC3B6D187A:r)
---
Peter,

I know I've counted on you before, but Peter, I wouldn't be emailing you today unless it was urgent, and it is. **[Only a few days remain in May, and we are still $20,000 short of our fundraising goal.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35552037:WNkzyCYeN:m:1:1320601823:A8F192F6A5B2700EB62FCEEC3B6D187A:r)**

Let me explain why reaching this goal is so critical. Already, liberals are lining up behind my Democrat opponent. They've dumped over $2 million dollars into his campaign during the last quarter and we know why: to defeat me and secure a liberal majority in the Senate.

You see, Patriot, Democrat special interest pals understand that I am not just "another politician" in the Senate.

**When I ran for the Senate in 2010, I pledged to destroy politics as usual in Washington.**

With your help, I've fought to do so each and every day, and I'm fighting to do it all again in my next term.

But I'm going to need your assistance.

Will you chip in to help me fight back and reach our May goals?

| [**INSTANT DONATE $25 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35552038:WNkzyCYeN:m:1:1320601823:A8F192F6A5B2700EB62FCEEC3B6D187A:r)
---

[**INSTANT DONATE $50 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35552039:WNkzyCYeN:m:1:1320601823:A8F192F6A5B2700EB62FCEEC3B6D187A:r)
---

[**INSTANT DONATE $100 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35552040:WNkzyCYeN:m:1:1320601823:A8F192F6A5B2700EB62FCEEC3B6D187A:r)
---

[**INSTANT DONATE $250 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35552041:WNkzyCYeN:m:1:1320601823:A8F192F6A5B2700EB62FCEEC3B6D187A:r)
---

[ Now, I'm counting on your most generous contribution of $100, $50, $25 or even $10 to make sure I get back to the U.S. Senate and continue battling.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35552037:WNkzyCYeN:m:1:1320601823:A8F192F6A5B2700EB62FCEEC3B6D187A:r)

I have proven time and time again that I am willing to fight to uphold the U.S. Constitution I know you and I treasure. **I cannot give up this fight to a liberal opponent, who will not stand up for liberty, but become part of the Washington problem.**

*** When the Obama administration implied they had the authority to use drones to kill Americans on American soil without trial, I fought them with a 13-hour filibuster.

*** When Big Government members of BOTH parties tried to RAM through an extension of Section 215 of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" with zero debate at the last minute, I stood up to them and forced this section of law to expire.

*** When President Obama attempted to insert American boots on the ground in Syria without debate or approval from Congress, I stood up for our Founders' constitutional proscription that only Congress can declare war.

*** When members of BOTH parties seemed ready to RAM gun control into law after the horrific 2012 Newtown tragedy, I led the fight to stop their schemes by pledging to filibuster ANY gun bill Harry Reid chose to bring to the floor.

*** When undercover videos were released showing Planned Parenthood employees chopping up aborted little boys and girls to sell off their organs for spare parts, I forced the U.S. Senate to vote on legislation defunding Planned Parenthood.

**Whether it's fighting ObamaCare, standing against unlimited hikes of the debt limit, stopping assaults on our liberties or flooding the country with dangerous Middle Eastern refugees, I have fought for you at every opportunity.**

[**INSTANT DONATE $25 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35552038:WNkzyCYeN:m:1:1320601823:A8F192F6A5B2700EB62FCEEC3B6D187A:r)
---

[**INSTANT DONATE $50 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35552039:WNkzyCYeN:m:1:1320601823:A8F192F6A5B2700EB62FCEEC3B6D187A:r)
---

[**INSTANT DONATE $100 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35552040:WNkzyCYeN:m:1:1320601823:A8F192F6A5B2700EB62FCEEC3B6D187A:r)
---

[**INSTANT DONATE $250 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35552041:WNkzyCYeN:m:1:1320601823:A8F192F6A5B2700EB62FCEEC3B6D187A:r)
---

Washington's unquestioned Big Government status quo is dying as a result.

But we're still $19 TRILLION in debt and liberals want to KEEP spending.

**I'm not about to stand by silently while America is pushed over the edge, beyond return -- I'm going to stand strong for fiscal sanity.**

Are you?

**Patriot, the special interests in Washington, D.C. believe that with all their money, there's no way we can stand up to them.**

After all, they have millions. They can write fat checks that few of us can ever even dream of.

**But we can do a lot.**

We've proven that liberty-loving citizens who stand together and fight can make a difference.

Just look at all we have accomplished over the past six years!

And think about what more we can do. Think about what more we must do together -- for the sake of freedom's survival.

Patriot, with liberal forces gunning for me, I must ask for your generosity once again.

**[Time in May is running out. Please agree to $100, $50 or $25 right away.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35552037:WNkzyCYeN:m:1:1320601823:A8F192F6A5B2700EB62FCEEC3B6D187A:r)**

Please be as generous as you can.

Thank you for all you do.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

subject: The maximum number of signatures

body:
On to the next goal... | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42da/1c469400/5537286/3564eb8/3142701659/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-26_may-eom2_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-26_may-eom2_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Our campaign's next big milestone is in less than a week: On June 1, Russ will turn in the maximum number of signatures allowed to be officially registered for the ballot in November! In just a few short weeks, we collected way more signatures than necessary, from all of Wisconsin's 72 counties. Volunteers went to farmer's markets, local party activists got to work, and we hit the streets to show what a grassroots campaign really looks like. But our work is far from done. We have to prepare to not only fight back against the 10 special interest groups that have aired ads against Russ, but to also build the infrastructure necessary to talk to voters face to face, all across the state. That means we need to hit our May online fundraising goal -- it's what we need to make sure we'll be ready to start the next phase of our campaign on June 1 with our best foot forward. **[Contribute $5 right now to help us hit our $50,000 May fundraising goal.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42da/1c469400/5537286/3564eb8/3142701659/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-26_may-eom2_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-26_may-eom2_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42da/1c469400/5537286/3564eb8/3142701659/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-26_may-eom2_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-26_may-eom2_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42da/1c469400/5537286/3564eb8/3142701659/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-26_may-eom2_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-26_may-eom2_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42da/1c469400/5537286/3564eb9/3142701659/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-26_may-eom2_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-26_may-eom2_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

name: Rob Portman
subject: 2 million voter contacts!
body:
| Peter -- I'm excited to announce that we just surpassed _2 million_ voter contacts! Since last May, our incredible team has built an unprecedented grassroots organization through our door-to-door and phone programs. Just this summer, we have more than 500 interns who will help us contact voters across the state! You can watch a recap of our grassroots campaign below:

[](https://www.robportman.com/two_million?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2million&n=1) This Senate race is going to be tough. National Democrats have reserved $20 million in ads supporting Ted Strickland this fall -- the most of any candidate in the country, Republican or Democrat. But we have the hardest working grassroots team in the country. We've had two very successful Super Saturday days of grassroots action when our team contacted more than 100,000 voters! Even during the winter, our [Winter Warriors knocked on doors in the snow](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DMoQHeLylCT4&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2million&n=2) and called hundreds of thousands of Ohio voters. This November, Ohio voters will have a choice between moving forward with our pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland’s failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government. Ohio simply can't afford a return to Ted Strickland's Ohio when our state lost more than 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation. Jane and I are grateful for your friendship, support, and prayers. With your help, we will win in November! All best,

Rob Portman [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2million&n=3)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2million&n=4)[](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2million&n=5 "Donate Here!")

---
-=-=-

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Our next endorsement
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
There are few people who have done more to address the obscene proliferation of money in politics than Russ Feingold.
**There is also no one the Koch brothers want to keep out of the U.S. Senate more than Russ Feingold.**
Russ is running to win a seat in the Senate from Republican Ron Johnson, someone who was called the Koch brothers' "model legislator."
Russ Feingold is someone we need in the Senate, and I'm proud to endorse his campaign. **Can you join me in helping elect Russ Feingold?**
[**Split a $2.70 contribution between Bernie 2016 and Russ Feingold before our final FEC fundraising deadline of the primary to show that we can elect senators who don't need big money in politics.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feingold-for-senate?refcode=em160526-s1-full-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feingold-for-senate?refcode=em160526-s1-full-nd")
Let me tell you a little about what made Russ so effective when he was in the Senate. Russ was the sole vote in the Senate against the USA Patriot Act in 2001. He opposed the war in Iraq, he fought disastrous trade deals and worked to reform our health care system. Russ was also an author of the McCain-Feingold Act to reform our corrupt campaign finance system.
Meanwhile, his Republican opponent credits a Koch brothers organization with inspiring him to run for Senate in the first place. Ron Johnson wants to privatize veterans' health care and even said he supports Donald Trump as the Republican nominee.
**Russ has already faced a huge influx of big money trying to keep him out of the Senate.** In fact, the Koch brothers had their ads from a $2 million campaign against Russ taken off the air by TV stations when they were noted to be "false, misleading, and deceptive."
That won't be the last time the Koch brothers try to take out Russ. We need to make sure that Russ can fight back and win.
[**Please make a $2.70 contribution between Bernie 2016 and Russ Feingold before our final FEC fundraising deadline of the primary to show the billionaire class that they can't buy our elections.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feingold-for-senate?refcode=em160526-s1-full-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feingold-for-senate?refcode=em160526-s1-full-nd")
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feingold-for-senate?refcode=em160526-s1-full-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feingold-for-senate?refcode=em160526-s1-full-nd")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

body:
---
**BREAKING: TRUMP RALLY IN MONTANA**
Friend,

Donald Trump is currently holding an event in Billings right now -- and Greg Gianforte is backing his campaign for president. They are clearly hoping it will be a big day for their side. Let's make it a big day for Steve instead.

With all of the hateful rhetoric and us-vs-them posturing we've seen this election cycle, Steve's responsible leadership stands out. He's reached across the aisle to get things done: unemployment is down and wages are up, thousands of Montanans now have access to health insurance and we're making record investments in our public schools.

**Tomorrow is a big pre-primary fundraising deadline.[ Chip in $25 to show that Montanans reject the kind of divisive, outlandish and mean-spirited policies of Donald Trump. ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2FY8Z9c3BZxSo4JcQDrF7%2FKtJ3CAIvb7g)**

Trump has referred to Mexicans as rapists, said you have to treat women "like #%*t," insulted our allies and unveiled policies that would destroy the full faith and credit of the United States and wreck the global economy. It's a huge red flag that Greg Gianforte is willing to fall in line behind him.

The stakes are high and this isn't the Montana way. **[We're $1,023 short of what we need by midnight tomorrow and are depending on you.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=BMyO4W%2FjpgvdGr8CL6xjTqtJ3CAIvb7g)**

Thanks,

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Our race is at a tipping point. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=ODk3NzUwNwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIyNTY4MTgyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Friend -- I believe that our state's future hangs in the balance of the results of this election. So much happened in May, I need to give you a snapshot of what's going on:
* **Donald Trump brought his hateful, violent campaign to Washington** and said he'd win here this November.
* **We added our name to the ballot**. As did 10 other people in the race for governor! We're officially off to the races.
* **Our Republican opponent started running ads** online, in print, and on the radio.

**Our economy and our schools, our earth, and our values** \-- these are what I'm fighting for, and I hope you are, too. This is a critical moment of change, and how we respond now will define our success going forward. [**Be part of this campaign, right now, by chipping in $5 today and let me know you 've got my back leading towards November.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=ODk3NzUwNwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIyNTY4MTgyS0&mt=2&rj=OTIyNTY4MTgyS0&rt=0) You and I know this race is at a pivot point -- but so do the Republicans. Governor Susana Martinez, the leader of the Republican Governors Association, will be in Washington in June to raise money for my opponent. This is the same group that turned Massachusetts and Maryland red in 2014. **We can 't afford to let the same happen to our own Washington state**. If you had any doubt that the Republicans were targeting me for defeat in 2016, that moment should be long gone. May was a busy month -- and that's why our campaign has set a bold goal: $50,000 before our official end-of-month deadline and we have to release our fundraising numbers to the public. name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Shocking California poll
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
California, here we come. A shocking new poll just came out that shows us just TWO POINTS back from Secretary Clinton in California's June 7 primary.
**California Poll (May 13-22)**
Public Policy Institute of California
**Hillary Clinton:** 46%
**Bernie Sanders:** 44%
The first poll of this primary in California had us losing the state by 53 percent. Now we're within striking distance of winning the most delegates in a single state of this entire election.
**Winning California would send an unmistakable message to the political establishment and the Democratic convention, and that's why we have to ask for your help in two ways:**
**[Call California voters this weekend](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/call-california-for-bernie?source=em160526-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/call-california-for-bernie?source=em160526-full")**
**[Contribute to
Bernie 2016](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/win-california?refcode=em160526-ca-poll "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/win-california?refcode=em160526-ca-poll")**
Make no mistake: every vote we earn, delegate we secure, and state we win is an affirmation of the progressive values shared by our political revolution. That's why we're going to have thousands of volunteers knocking on doors and making calls this weekend, and why we're going to work hard towards the final FEC deadline of our primary next week.
Bernie wants to see California in our win column. I do too.
Do you?
**Yes,[I can volunteer to call California voters for Bernie this weekend.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/call-california-for-bernie?source=em160526-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/call-california-for-bernie?source=em160526-full")**
**Yes,[I can contribute $3 to Bernie's campaign to help win California.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/win-california?refcode=em160526-ca-poll "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/win-california?refcode=em160526-ca-poll")**
Five more states also vote with California, and we're going to fight to win there too. Let's keep our political revolution going all the way to the convention.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/win-california?refcode=em160526-ca-poll "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/win-california?refcode=em160526-ca-poll")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
